steps: 1. The question asks for a unit to measure length. 2. Length is a one-dimensional measurement. 3. Check each option: A) Square centimetres (cm²) measures area, not length. B) Centimetres (cm) measures length. C) Cubic centimetres (cm³) measures volume, not length. D) Kilograms (kg) measures mass, not length. E) Litres (l) measures capacity (volume), not length. 4. Only centimetres (cm) is a correct unit for measuring length.
